_description: Canonical registry of all NER pipeline model versions. Each entry records config, metrics, and the artefact path so any version can be reproduced or compared.

models.name: Regex-Only Baseline
models.description: Pure regex PHI detector with no ML component. Used as F1 baseline.
models.notes: Initial baseline — regex-only, no ML dependency.

models.name: spaCy Hybrid v1.0
models.description: en_core_web_sm 3.7.1 + regex post-processing. First production-grade model.
models.notes: First spaCy-backed version. ~7pp F1 improvement over baseline.

models.name: spaCy Hybrid v1.1 — Extended Regex
models.description: Adds DOB, MRN, and HOSPITAL regex patterns. Improved recall on dense notes.

models.name: spaCy Hybrid v1.2 - Anomaly-Aware
models.description: Integrates AnomalyDetector isolation-forest scoring and ReadmissionPredictor. Current production model.
models.notes: Adds probabilistic outlier detection. Readmission predictor self-calibrates from corpus. ACTIVE MODEL.
